CustomField.description: This field stores the current stage of the credit calculation process for the order item. Values for this field are sourced directly from NetSuite. Any change to this field's value will automatically trigger the credit calculation process for the associated order item. JIRA Story: FY25SR-319 and FY25SR-1144
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates the current status of the credit calculation. Values are populated from NetSuite. A change in this status triggers the credit calculation.
CustomField.label: Credit Calculation Status
